prompt:
A laptop on a wooden desk displaying a stylized code editor with a single `.github/workflows/ci.yml` file open in a tab, represented by colored blocks and bracket-like shapes instead of readable text. Beside the laptop lies a printed sheet of paper with a simple flow diagram of green checkmark icons connected by arrows, hinting that the file defines a continuous integration workflow that runs tests on push. A mechanical keyboard, mug, and small plant complete the scene.

Near-future solarpunk workspace aesthetic with warm ambient lighting, subtle LED backlighting behind the desk, and perhaps a tiny solar panel or eco-themed sticker in the background. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos and no legible text on the screen or paper. The composition should clearly represent the CI workflow file as a digital artifact in the inventory.
